{{Fig|SuperMemo 19 simplifies generating multiple occlusion tests from the same picture. In the picture, the structure of the hippocampus is mastered with the help of occlusion rectangles generated in '''Occlusion Test''' dialog window. In the background, template item will be reused in all generated tests. See: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v{{=}}70JFgD4bEk8 video] or read [[Incremental_learning#Cloze_for_pictures|Cloze for pictures]]}}
